par_visualization.name: Cycle Time

Contact your admin for more info.","emptyStateAlignment":"vertical-centered","hideDevSettings":false,"configPropModifiers":{},"showMaximumRange":false,"allowChangeDateRange":false,"applyDateRange":false,"numberOfPeriods":3,"showAbsolutePeriod":false,"scoreType":"latest","showChangeFrom":null,"period":null,"useDataCache":false,"cacheExpirationTime":0,"showCacheTime":true,"dateFormat":"default","showRefresh":true,"showFilterAsSeparateSeries":false,"componentId":"lz7vt3rw","filterPerMetric":[],"configVersion":"23.0.0-ci-SNAPSHOT","sortBy":"value","dataCategory":"group","colorConfig":{"type":"default"},"dataSources":[{"isDatabaseView":false,"allowRealTime":true,"sourceType":"table","tableOrViewName":"incident","filterQuery":"business_durationISNOTEMPTY^business_duration>1970-01-01 00:00:00","preferredVisualizations":["d24d53f60350de7a652caf3188a46ed2"],"id":"dGFibGVpbmNpZGVudDE3MzcwNjM4MDA5NDM=","dataCategories":["trend","group","simple"]}],"trendBy":{"trendByFrequency":"date","trendByMinuteInterval":null,"trendByFields":[{"field":"activity_due","metric":"ZEdGaWJHVnBibU5wWkdWdWRERTNNemN3TmpNNE1EQTVORE09MTczNzA2MzgwMzg1OQ=="}]},"metrics":[{"dataSource":"dGFibGVpbmNpZGVudDE3MzcwNjM4MDA5NDM=","id":"ZEdGaWJHVnBibU5wWkdWdWRERTNNemN3TmpNNE1EQTVORE09MTczNzA2MzgwMzg1OQ==","aggregateFunction":"MAX","axisId":"primary","aggregateField":"business_duration","durationFormat":{"customFormat":false}}]}
